title: Big Ships!
description: A mod that adds ships that you can ride to Minecraft.
body:
Sail the seas in a big ship!

This mod adds the Shipbuilding Table, which is crafted using 3 planks, 5 iron ingots, and a boat. The Shipbuilding Table allows you to create a ship, which costs 2 stacks of planks.

![Shipbuilding Table crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcba6bc770e39d998b008cd1e02836b6f5d04bfb.png)

![Shipbuilding Table UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7722d924f29acb5d283c39d29314e5be5b68df95_0.webp)

Ships can be entered by right-clicking on the center of the bottom floor of the ship. Controls are W/A to move, S/D to turn, and shift to dismount.

Demo:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7RCqZz9HRTc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Ship collisions are not working yet but will be coming soon! More ship types and customization will be coming soon as well.

Made for [Hackcraft V2](https://hackcraft.hackclub.com/)
